channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Val Kilmer to Be AI-ed Into Movie with Blessing of His Family
item.description: Val Kilmer had a lot of unconventional beliefs, and the director claims this is what he wanted.

item.title: Upgrade your home the savvy way with these 12 gizmos and gadgets, all under AU$100
item.description: Amazon's Big Smile Sale continues to deliver with discounts on home tech, and I've found the best deals under AU$100.
